actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 297462335, script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building4 has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick). Persistent call targets MonoBehaviour id: 297462333 (script guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68) which is the Residential script attached to Building4. On click, it should invoke Residential.showlabel(), updating Player->child[1] TextMeshPro to the first 20 chars of 'Residential:Neko Apartment'.
